title: SSO callback mismatch
description: SAML ACS URL misconfigured in IdP. Case #1
resolution: Update IdP ACS URL and clear stale browser cookies.

title: 429 burst on public API
description: Client sent high-frequency polling requests. Case #2
resolution: Use webhook alternative and exponential backoff.

title: Webhook endpoint timeout
description: Receiver processing exceeded 5s timeout. Case #3
resolution: Move processing to async queue and return 2xx quickly.

title: Dashboard loading slowly
description: Query lacked date filter and index hit. Case #4
resolution: Apply default 30-day filter and add DB index.

title: Password reset mail not received
description: SMTP sender domain missing SPF record. Case #5
resolution: Add SPF and DKIM records, then re-verify sender.
